raw_text: rafael torres parish sodio st. 19, 42 8 madrid, 28045 rafaeltorresparish@gmail.com +34 610574821 31.05.1992 (seville) sot iol ak aaa ica aeake daca aa aa like to define myself as a creative, innovative, communicative and kind person. always taking care of the people that am working with. with good social skills, love speaking in public and sharing my opinion. education masters degree in aeronautical engineering, university of seville (oct. 2017). - final project: results comparison of cfd analysis between floefd module of catia v5 and fluent. undergraduate degree in aerospace engineering, university of seville (sept. 2015). - final project: frequency design of controllers for rotary-wing uavs by means of two degrees of freedom loops to optimize disturbance rejection. master's degree in decision making and innovation. gaia program (apr. 2017 present). = google activate entrepreneurship programme, complutense university (may 2017). leisure & free time monitor title, itaka-escolapios foundation (jul. 2014). professional experience = avionics & system engineer in airbus, in teaya-tl4 surveillance systems department (march 2017 present). gaia program internship. speaker in pegasus-aiaa student conference in technische universitat berlin (apr 2017). - project: design and development of the automatic control for boom of a330 mrtt. speaker in x avionics & navigation systems seminar sinasa in seville (apr. 2015). - project: design of an automatic pilot for b-787 optimizing disturbance rejection in trajectory tracking. = active member in euroavia and leem us (2010 - 2017). languages & skills advanced - negotiation level in english & spanish. passionate of technologies, education and sharing, proactive, curious, responsible, detailed oriented and with excellent collaborative skills. = advanced level in catia v5, matlab, simulink, fluent, floefd, ms office (visual basic), nastran-patran and autocad. additional experience & data leisure & free time monitor of teens as volunteer (2010 present) and camp leader (2016 - present) in itaka-escolapios foundation. = b1 driving licence. free to travel. own vehicle. * guitarist, tennis and padel player (ex-federated), made my own drone.
